description: A Machine Learning Engineer develops, trains, evaluates, and deploys machine learning models that enable systems to learn from data and make intelligent predictions or decisions.
roadmap: Learn Linear Algebra and Calculus Basics
interview_questions: What is Machine Learning?
What are the different types of Machine Learning?
What is supervised learning?
What is unsupervised learning?
What is reinforcement learning?
What is overfitting?
What is underfitting?
What is the difference between training and testing data?
What is feature engineering?
What is the difference between classification and regression?
What is cross-validation?
What is the bias-variance tradeoff?
What is regularization?
What is the difference between L1 and L2 regularization?
What are precision, recall, and F1-score?
What is a confusion matrix?
What is ROC-AUC?
How does a Decision Tree work?
What is Random Forest and why is it better than a single Decision Tree?
What is the difference between bagging and boosting?
How does XGBoost work?
What is gradient descent?
What are the assumptions of Linear Regression?
How do you handle imbalanced datasets?
What is feature selection and why is it important?
How would you optimize a Machine Learning model?
What is hyperparameter tuning?
What are neural networks and how do they work?
How would you deploy a Machine Learning model into production?
What challenges are faced in building end-to-end Machine Learning systems?
certifications: Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
